defect_or_gate: 31 selected SVG rows have declared text below the 14 px warning floor, concentrated in Chapters 1, 8, 9, 11, 14, 17, and 18.
acceptance_check: Revise or page-proof those SVGs before final placement; source/caveat lines must remain readable at trim size.
risk_if_ignored: Charts and mechanism diagrams will look polished in source files but collapse into small-type noise in the PDF.

defect_or_gate: Chapters 17 and 18 have 4 of 4 selected SVG rows in render-scale review, and Chapter 8 also has 4 of 4.
acceptance_check: Before full-book render, run chapter-specific page-image checks for these chapters or simplify labels.
risk_if_ignored: Late technical sections may become dense diagram walls exactly where readers need the most help.

defect_or_gate: A-0096, A-0075, and A-0110 need explicit source/caveat cleanup or caption-proximity proof; A-0089 and A-0062 combine small text with missing source/caveat language.
acceptance_check: Add visible source/caveat lines or confirm same-block caption/source notes in final layout.
risk_if_ignored: Uncaptioned diagrams can smuggle model-rank, safety, product, autonomy, or trust claims.

defect_or_gate: 20 rows need text-contrast proxy review, mostly older muted-label palettes or white-on-panel text that requires page-image confirmation.
acceptance_check: Use grayscale and page-image checks before final render; revise muted text colors if weak on paper.
risk_if_ignored: Subtle labels may disappear in print or grayscale review.

acceptance_check: Increase essential strokes or prove they are decorative only in page-image QA.
risk_if_ignored: Flow arrows, gridlines, or separators may disappear at book size.

acceptance_check: Carry A-0013 into page-image QA, preserving the historical-slice caption and no-live-rank caveat.

defect_or_gate: 15 rows fall into style/metadata review after scale and annotation defects are separated.
acceptance_check: Patch accessibility metadata, contrast, or thin-stroke issues before render QA.
risk_if_ignored: Accessibility and production traceability remain uneven across visual families.
